hero.title: Empowering Communities Through LiftersTouch
hero.description: We provide the tools, resources, and support needed to uplift individuals and transform neighborhoods. Join our mission to create lasting impact.

aboutPreview.title: Our Story
aboutPreview.description: Founded on the belief that everyone deserves a chance to thrive, LiftersTouch has been working tirelessly to bridge the gap between potential and opportunity.

programsPreview.title: Our Impact Programs
programsPreview.description: Targeted initiatives designed to address the most pressing needs in our communities.

items.title: Youth Mentorship
items.description: Connecting young minds with experienced professionals to guide their career paths.

items.title: Urban Farming
items.description: Promoting food security and sustainable living through community gardens.

items.title: Tech Literacy
items.description: Providing digital skills training to bridge the technological divide.
